name: Match Flow
description: Controls the ebb and flow of match momentum

entries.templateText: {WRESTLER_2} absorbs a brutal shot from {WRESTLER_1} and fires back with three unanswered strikes — the crowd comes alive.
{WRESTLER_1} pulls the referee between themselves and {WRESTLER_2}, using the distraction to land a low blow.
{WRESTLER_2} ducks a clothesline from {WRESTLER_1} and hits a lightning-fast spinning heel kick, completely shifting the momentum.
{WRESTLER_1} is trapped in the corner but explodes out with a desperate lariat, catching {WRESTLER_2} flat-footed.
{WRESTLER_2} catches {WRESTLER_1} off guard with an athletic springboard dropkick, sending both wrestlers to the canvas.
{WRESTLER_1} unloads a string of heavy chops that echoes through the arena, shutting down a brief comeback by {WRESTLER_2}.
{WRESTLER_2} reverses a suplex attempt from {WRESTLER_1}, planting them hard and rallying the crowd for a counter-attack.
{WRESTLER_1} completely shuts down the high-flying style of {WRESTLER_2} with a brutal, mid-air interception.
{WRESTLER_1} hides a pair of brass knuckles in their trunks, blasting {WRESTLER_2} when the referee's vision is obscured.
{WRESTLER_1} uses the ring ropes for illegal leverage during a pin attempt on {WRESTLER_2}, desperately trying to steal a win.
{WRESTLER_1} detaches the turnbuckle pad while the referee is distracted, looking to ram {WRESTLER_2} into the exposed steel.
{WRESTLER_1} blatantly rakes the eyes of {WRESTLER_2} to escape an disadvantageous position in the center of the ring.
{WRESTLER_1} chokes {WRESTLER_2} with the camera cable at ringside, letting go at the absolute last second of the referee's five-count.
{WRESTLER_1} pulls a handful of tights during a rollup on {WRESTLER_2}, forcing a frantic, narrow escape.
{WRESTLER_1} sprays an unknown substance directly into the eyes of {WRESTLER_2} while the referee is clearing technical gear from the ring.
{WRESTLER_1} hits a beautiful brainbuster on {WRESTLER_2}, but {WRESTLER_2} kicks out at 2.9, causing the stadium to erupt.
{WRESTLER_1} secures a deep roll-up on {WRESTLER_2}, but {WRESTLER_2} powers out at the absolute last microsecond.
{WRESTLER_1} lands a devastating top-rope elbow drop, but {WRESTLER_2} gets a shoulder up just before the three-count.
{WRESTLER_1} covers {WRESTLER_2} with a lazy, arrogant one-hand press, allowing {WRESTLER_2} to easily kick out and build fire.
{WRESTLER_1} delivers a textbook powerbomb to {WRESTLER_2}, but the subsequent slow cover allows for a highly dramatic near-fall.
{WRESTLER_1} scales the ropes to deliver a victory pose before pinning {WRESTLER_2}, giving {WRESTLER_2} enough time to survive the cover.
{WRESTLER_1} locks in a crossface that looks like the end, but {WRESTLER_2} dramatically scratches and claws to touch the bottom rope.
An accidental collision knocks the referee out cold, leaving {WRESTLER_1} and {WRESTLER_2} completely on their own without an official.
The referee is slow to get into position, costing {WRESTLER_1} a clear three-count over a totally incapacitated {WRESTLER_2}.
The referee catches {WRESTLER_1} trying to use a foreign object on {WRESTLER_2}, throwing the weapon out and issuing a final warning.
{WRESTLER_1} gets into a heated face-to-face argument with the referee, giving {WRESTLER_2} plenty of time to shake off the damage.
A disputed count by the referee leads to total confusion in the ring, allowing {WRESTLER_2} to sneak in a quick rollup on {WRESTLER_1}.
The referee misses a blatant low blow from {WRESTLER_1} on {WRESTLER_2} because they were busy handling a distraction on the apron.
An aggressive manager jumps onto the apron, breaking up a submission hold that {WRESTLER_2} had locked tight on {WRESTLER_1}.
A rival faction member sprints down the ramp, tripping {WRESTLER_2} from the floor while {WRESTLER_1} hits the ropes.
An ally of {WRESTLER_2} rushes the ring to neutralize outside interference, keeping the playing field level against {WRESTLER_1}.
{WRESTLER_1} profits from a sudden distraction at the entranceway, allowing them to blindside an unfocused {WRESTLER_2}.
The tag team partner of {WRESTLER_1} sneaks a heavy metal chair into the ring while the referee deals with {WRESTLER_2}.
An uninvited superstar walks out to the stage, completely distracting both {WRESTLER_1} and {WRESTLER_2} as the match grinds to a halt.
{WRESTLER_1} whips {WRESTLER_2} violently into the ringside steel steps, sending a sickening thud through the entire arena floor.
{WRESTLER_2} side-steps a charging {WRESTLER_1}, sending {WRESTLER_1} crashing shoulder-first directly into the unyielding steel ring post.
{WRESTLER_1} launches {WRESTLER_2} over the barricade into the timekeeper's area, smashing equipment and scattered chairs.
{WRESTLER_2} reverses a move on the apron, dropping {WRESTLER_1} spine-first onto the hardest part of the ring frame.
{WRESTLER_1} clears off the announcer's table, looking to finish {WRESTLER_2} off with a high-impact slam through the plastic surface.
Both {WRESTLER_1} and {WRESTLER_2} tumble over the top rope together, landing heavily on the protective floor mats outside.
{WRESTLER_2} locks in a textbook sleeper hold on {WRESTLER_1}, and the crowd chants wildly as the arm of {WRESTLER_1} drops twice.
{WRESTLER_2} locks a surprise sharpshooter center ring, forcing {WRESTLER_1} into a desperate crawl toward the safety of the ropes.
{WRESTLER_1} resists an armbar from {WRESTLER_2}, utilizing brute physical strength to lift and slam them down to break the hold.
{WRESTLER_2} traps the ankle of {WRESTLER_1} in a high-torque submission, causing {WRESTLER_1} to agonizingly scream out in pain.
{WRESTLER_1} attempts to use a submission hold, but {WRESTLER_2} expertly counters it into a quick, close pinfall attempt.
{WRESTLER_1} lands awkwardly on their ankle after a top-rope maneuver, clutching the joint as the referee checks for a real injury.
{WRESTLER_2} is visibly dazed after a stiff strike from {WRESTLER_1}, prompting the ringside physician to briefly monitor the situation.
{WRESTLER_1} targets a heavily bandaged ribs area on {WRESTLER_2}, causing {WRESTLER_2} to double over in absolute agony.
A bad landing out on the concrete floor leaves {WRESTLER_2} completely motionless, building massive tension throughout the arena.
The medical staff rushes the apron after a scary head drop spot between {WRESTLER_1} and {WRESTLER_2}, slowing the match pace to a crawl.
The live crowd starts a deafening, unified chant for {WRESTLER_2}, visibly fueling them to power out of a lengthy chinlock from {WRESTLER_1}.
The hostile arena atmosphere completely rattles {WRESTLER_1}, causing them to botch a standard running maneuver on {WRESTLER_2}.
{WRESTLER_2} stands up and feeds directly off the massive crowd energy, absorbing right-hand strikes from {WRESTLER_1} without flinching.
{WRESTLER_1} aggressively goads the crowd, drawing massive boos that mask a sudden, opportunistic counter-strike from {WRESTLER_2}.
A stadium-wide dueling chant creates an incredibly epic big-match atmosphere as {WRESTLER_1} and {WRESTLER_2} trade heavy blows center ring.
{WRESTLER_2} pulls off a breathtaking desperation dropkick out of the corner, catching a charging {WRESTLER_1} square in the jaw.
{WRESTLER_1} is running hot, but {WRESTLER_2} catches them out of nowhere with a desperation DDT, leaving both wrestlers laid out flat.
{WRESTLER_2} hits a wild, high-stakes dive over the top rope, crashing blindly into {WRESTLER_1} to stop a slow defeat.
{WRESTLER_1} dominates for minutes until {WRESTLER_2} hits a desperation low blow while the referee's view is entirely blocked.
{WRESTLER_2} uses a sudden jawbreaker to instantly break out of an overwhelming, heavy power hold applied by {WRESTLER_1}.
{WRESTLER_2} fights through a wave of exhaustion to nail {WRESTLER_1} with an overhead belly-to-belly suplex into the turnbuckle.
{WRESTLER_1} attempts a high-risk splash, but {WRESTLER_2} gets their knees up, inflicting immense damage to the midsection of {WRESTLER_1}.
{WRESTLER_1} applies a grueling bearhug, systematically wearing down the core strength and breathing capability of {WRESTLER_2}.
{WRESTLER_2} lands a flurry of quick, tactical kicks to the legs of {WRESTLER_1}, successfully cutting the bigger wrestler down to size.
{WRESTLER_1} uses an aggressive, illegal hair pull to drag {WRESTLER_2} back down to the canvas during a crucial vertical base scramble.
{WRESTLER_2} executes a textbook sunset flip from the second rope, securing a highly convincing, fast two-count on {WRESTLER_1}.
{WRESTLER_1} throws {WRESTLER_2} over the top rope, but {WRESTLER_2} skins the cat to pull themselves back in, shocking an unaware {WRESTLER_1}.
{WRESTLER_1} systematically targets the left arm of {WRESTLER_2}, slamming it repeatedly against the hard edge of the ring apron.
{WRESTLER_2} hits a desperation enzuigiri that rocks {WRESTLER_1}, sending {WRESTLER_1} stumbling through the ropes out to the floor.
{WRESTLER_1} lands a massive running big boot that sends the mouthguard of {WRESTLER_2} flying across the ringside area.
{WRESTLER_2} uses a back body drop to send an overaggressive {WRESTLER_1} flying high over the ropes onto a group of security personnel.
{WRESTLER_1} locks a sleeper hold on {WRESTLER_2}, using the referee's body position to mask their fingers actively gripping the illegal tights.
{WRESTLER_2} hits a series of rapid-fire clotheslines, bringing the entire stadium audience to their feet as {WRESTLER_1} stumbles.
{WRESTLER_1} attempts a simple vertical suplex, but their lower back spasms, causing them to drop {WRESTLER_2} awkwardly.
{WRESTLER_2} slides between the legs of {WRESTLER_1}, executing a lightning-fast schoolboy pin that almost ends the match right here.
{WRESTLER_1} bites the forehead of {WRESTLER_2} while trapped in a tight corner lockup, drawing a stern admonishment from the official.
{WRESTLER_2} connects with a spectacular diving crossbody, but {WRESTLER_1} uses the momentum to roll through and attempt a pin of their own.
{WRESTLER_1} drives their knee repeatedly into the skull of {WRESTLER_2} while {WRESTLER_2} is helplessly trapped in the ring ropes.
{WRESTLER_2} unloads a fierce desperate headbutt that stuns both competitors, leaving them sagging against the turnbuckles to recover.
{WRESTLER_1} mocks the signature taunt of {WRESTLER_2}, immediately turning around into a devastating, explosive lariat from a furious {WRESTLER_2}.
